**输出：** 31

- 第二个查询 `[0, 2, 1, 2]` 将下标 0、1 和 2 的元素乘以 2，数组变为 `[4, 18, 2, 15, 4]`。

function solve(nums, queries) {

    const MOD = 10**9 +7;

    const n = nums.length;

    // Initialize product array with 1s.

    const product = new Array(n).fill(1);

    for (const query of queries) {

        const [li, ri, ki, vi] = query;

        let idx = li;

        while (idx <= ri) {

            product[idx] = (product[idx] * vi) % MOD;

            idx += ki;

        }

    }

    // Now compute the final nums array.

    const result = [];

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        result[i] = (nums[i] * product[i]) % MOD;

    }

    // Compute XOR of all elements.

    let xor = 0;

    for (let num of result) {

        xor ^= num;

    }

    return xor;

}
